undischarged: NOETHER-R1 (STRUCTURAL / conservation of the basis coordinate): Definition 3's invariant 'usBasis equals the last effective element of the chain, by construction because both are folds of the same events through applyTx' is false for retro-effective boundaries inserted mid-chain -- the very case Definition 2 and the composition-order oracle exist for. applyTx folds in booking (log) order (sec07.tex:97-98; P4 forbids reordering) and SetBasis is absolute last-write-wins, so a boundary with t_eff earlier than an already-committed boundary, booked later, sets usBasis to a mid-chain point on live application AND on corrected replay. The two folds (booking-order status fold vs effective-order chain projection) do not commute on the retro orbit. Sec-6's re-stamp events repair observation stamps and compensating transactions repair moves, but nothing stated repairs or protects the coordinate: neither an effective-aware handler obligation nor a weld clause admitting SetBasis b only when b is the post-insertion last-effective element. Consequence: 'basis regressed by a late notice' is a representable ledger state; beta_t is wrong; snapshots become coherent-at-a-stale-assignment (mixed-basis stays unreachable, stale-basis valuation becomes reachable through the front door); P10's restated coherent-endpoint hypothesis is satisfied vacuously at the wrong beta. Part III #19's 'cannot desynchronise' discharge of M6 is asserted, not constructed. Repair is one weld sentence plus one retro-insertion permutation oracle, but as written the objection is open.
notes: Anchors verified against the bundle (Ledger.hs:290-311, 329-358; sec05.tex:29-57; sec06.tex:99; appD.tex:44-57; sec07.tex:93-200; appB.tex P1-P10 and the P11-P23 note). VERDICTS: (1) Mixed-basis unreachability HOLDS as honestly tiered: parametricity over the skolem assignment with unexported constructors and door-only introduction forms (snapBal/snapPrice/carry), runtime witness at the erased boundary in the existing C11 authorship-erasure idiom, fail-closed partial declarations, joint stamps for derived data, no equivariance assumed; W2-prime is coherent-at-beta-minus, never mixed, and is not a Cash. (2) Protected elements undisturbed: conservation, atomic move, log immutability byte-identical in obligation; every addition is an appended event class, StatusWrite constructor, named projection, or seam refinement; P5/P6/P8/P10/P21 restated where touched. (3) Path-independent PnL restored conditionally: Theorem 1 + C3 close the telescope; carry makes the attribution decomposition writable across invertible boundaries (8a.6 arithmetic checks out); Pending/Terminal refuse honestly -- but the condition inherits NOETHER-R1 in the retro case. MINOR (not blocking, should be registered): (a) sec05's FIRST illegal state ('held unit with no price unrepresentable' via total PriceVec) is repealed, not preserved -- 'gain a fourth' miscounts and 'none weakened' is false for this non-numbered guarantee, though the repeal IS the repair (PriceVec totality was what made the phantom 70.8 silently valid); (b) 8a.5's 'a program that does not exist' overclaims: Cash's constructor is ubiquitous, so a black box can fabricate Cash ex nihilo -- scoped out by the standing directive (legal-to-feed, not internals) and Invariant B's wording, but the rhetoric should match the N9 honesty discipline; (c) exclusion of a bare injector x -> At b x from the index-preserving combinators is load-bearing and unstated; (d) SetBasis has two writer rows (CA handler, basis-notice handler) -- precedented by WAc/WAcTrade but the C11 'ONE canonical writer' prose should note the per-(field,handler) reading. Model-free: compliant throughout; operators are declared data under one generic evaluator; split/divisor appear only as illustrations; pricing is forall b. Snapshot b -> r.

undischarged: F1 (HIGH/CRITICAL-at-the-letter): basis indices in `PriceAt`/`BalAt`/`PriceAt'`/`BalAt'`/`At`/`Snapshot` are inferred role PHANTOM in GHC; `Data.Coerce.coerce` (Safe Haskell, no unsafe features) forges an epoch/skolem crossing regardless of unexported constructors, so the mixed-basis pairing IS a program and reaches a committed Cash bypassing the withSnapshot witness check — refutes the Section 4 unreachability enumeration and leaves discharge-register item 10 (Z4/T9/M4) incompletely discharged. Remediation: `type role ... nominal` on every basis-indexed carrier plus an explicit language-fragment proviso for the parametricity appeal.

F2 (HIGH): Invariant B clause (ii) is ill-defined under beta = beta_t|S — for worked case (c), dom(stamp(divisor)) = {I,A,B} exceeds a scope holding only I, so beta(A), beta(B) are undefined exactly where the joint-basis carrier (discharge of Z5/M8/N2) is exercised. Remediation: define beta = beta_t on S united with all consumed-datum stamp domains (or beta_t total over UnitId with S restricting balances only) and state the scope-closure condition on withSnapshot.

F3 (MEDIUM-HIGH): 'effective order' (Def. 2, Composition Law) is a partial order used as total; two non-commuting boundaries on one unit with equal t_eff (same-day dividend + split — the design's own 49-vs-50 pair) leave the composite ambiguous, and booking order was correctly banished so no tie-break survives in the text. Remediation: stated total order (t_eff, W4-attested intra-day precedence declared in the notice, boundary id) with W4 requiring same-t_eff boundaries to declare mutual precedence.
notes: All bundle anchors verified (Ledger.hs:290-311, 329-358; sec05.tex:26-57; sec06.tex:99; appD.tex:35-57; sec07.tex replay/time-travel; sec01.tex:24 Property 5; sec11.tex:51; sec14.tex:41). Certified: (2) failure modes (a),(b),(c) structurally excluded with all worked numbers arithmetically verified (2000x50=100k; 102-2=100 with q*c=2k cash leg, total 102k invariant; D=1.44, phantom 70.83 refused fail-closed, D'=1.02 restores 100; attribution +10,000/0 via carry; 49-vs-50 discriminator). (4) Model-free: no pricing/volatility model appears or is depended on; operators are declared data through one generic evaluator; splits/dividends/divisors appear only as illustrations; F = forall b. Snapshot b -> r throughout; equivariance explicitly refused. (1) Invariant B is formally stated and clause (iii) correctly makes it black-box-meaningful, but the statement is partial (F2) and the compile-side unreachability proof holds only for a fragment excluding Coercible, unstated (F1). (3) The two-tier architecture is sound and honestly claimed, but the Haskell as written does not enforce the invariant in GHC's type system absent nominal role annotations (F1; established from settled GHC role-system semantics — no GHC toolchain available in this environment for a compile run). The converged skeleton, the weld/Theorem 1, the W1-W4 regimes, and the discharge register otherwise stand; all three findings have local, forced, mechanism-preserving repairs, upon whose incorporation the committee sees no remaining obstacle. pass=false solely because F1-F3 are material and absent from the ruling text as filed.
